arts.ttl: Official | Ismaël Bennacer joins Marseille from Milan
arts.sum: AC Milan have confirmed the departure of Ismaël Bennacer (27) on loan to Olympique de Marseille. The transfer fee has not been disclosed but reports suggest that Marseille have paid…

Napoli have officially announced the acquisition of Noah Okafor from AC Milan. The talented Swiss forward joins the Partenopei on a loan deal with an option to buy, bolstering their attacking options for the remainder of the 2024/25 season. The post OFFICIAL: Napoli Sign Noah Okafor appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Official: Milan loan Okafor to Napoli with option to buy
arts.sum: Milan have officially sent Noah Okafor to Napoli on loan for €1.5m with an option...

Roma have officially announced the signing of Victor Nelsson from Galatasaray, bolstering their defensive options for the remainder of the 2024-2025 season. The 26-year-old Danish centre-back joins the Giallorossi on a loan deal with an option to buy, marking an exciting addition to Claudio Ranieri's squad. The post OFFICIAL: Roma Sign Victor Nelsson appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Genoa have officially announced the signing of Hugo Cuenca from AC Milan on a permanent transfer. The 20-year-old Paraguayan midfielder joins the Rossoblu after an impressive stint with Milan's youth teams. The post OFFICIAL: Genoa sign Hugo Cuenca appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Mexico forward Giménez joins Pulisic at AC Milan
arts.sum: AC Milan have announced the signing of Mexico forward Santiago Giménez from Feyenoord . Former AC Milan Zlatan brahimovic, now club advisor, said he is pleased the club have signed Giménez.

arts.ttl: Fulham in double Deadline Day talks as Samuel Chukwueze and Willian return targeted
arts.sum: The club are also keen to sign a right-back before tonight’s deadline
